name: Popomon
description: A Slime Digimon that looks like a species of plant. It skillfully uses its tail, which looks like a leaf, and it moves by jumping little by little. Because it has a very timid personality, it will immediately flee if any strangers approach, but it is said that once it gives its trust to someone, it will be attached to them for life. While escaping the opponent it uses its " Hair Mist ", scattering the hairs of its coat to create a distraction.
